title: heliotropium ternatum var. fumana
intro: Heliotropium ternatum var. fumana is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Heliotropium plant, which belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Heliotropium ternatum var. fumana include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can be used to create topical creams and salves for skin and wound care.
